subject.label: Treasury withdrawal: Example Tooling Grant, Q2 2026

body.content: I am broadly supportive of this proposal's goals and team, and intend to vote YES provided the two ambiguities noted below are resolved by a binding addendum before the voting window closes. If they are not, I will vote NO.

conditions.description: Milestone 2 text says 'substantial progress on the indexer.' This is not a measurable acceptance criterion. Please publish a binding addendum enumerating what constitutes substantial progress — e.g. specific endpoints implemented, test coverage percentage, or a demo artifact.
The proposal's timeline section says 'approximately 6 months' but the withdrawal schedule implies a hard 9-month deadline. Clarify which is binding on milestone enforcement.

body.comment: Happy to endorse publicly once a binding addendum lands.
